case_ref: kp_0022 (v1.2 defective item; re-anchored in v1.3)

fable_review.note: Fair reading of a DEFECTIVE item: the v1.2 quote emphasized the recognition PATTERN (amortize/ratable) and hid the deferred-liability nature, so the arm's SAME was reasonable. Fixed in v1.3 (side_a re-anchored to 'sit as an obligation'). Run-2 scores.json is NEVER retro-edited; this exhibit excuses the miss.

model_output.cited_a: Prepaid program dues amortize across the coverage term.
model_output.cited_b: Ratable recognition posts each month of the plan.
model_output.reason: OBJECT: both describe membership/program dues fees recognized over the coverage term — the same underlying quantity ("prepaid program dues" vs "membership fee ... plan"). SCOPE: both retail, and both are symmetrically silent on segment/ownership class, so that silence is not a conflict. MECHANISM: both state the identical driver — ratable amortization of the prepaid dues across the coverage/plan term ("amortize across the coverage term" = "ratable recognition posts each month of the plan"). The name difference (deferred balance vs recognized income) is just two labels for the same ratable-recognition event, not a different causal position. All three checks hold.
